mfa.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
mfa.description: Enter the verification code sent to your email or authenticator app.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed — check HA logs for details
error.too_many_requests: Garmin is rate limiting your IP. Stop retrying and wait at least 2 hours before trying again. Each retry makes it worse.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Garmin — check HA logs for details
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred — check HA logs for details
